requirement_topic.en: Cell and Battery Pack Safety — NS / IEC 62133

summary.en: Nepal builds its national standards （Nepal Standard, NS） largely by adopting International Electrotechnical Commission （IEC） standards. For portable lithium cells and battery packs, the relevant safety reference is IEC 62133-2 （Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries — Part 2: Lithium systems）, adopted nationally as the applicable NS where NBSM has scheduled the category. The standard covers abuse testing （overcharge, external short-circuit, crush, impact, drop, thermal abuse, forced discharge） and electrochemical safety limits. Where NBSM operates a mandatory NS certification or conformity scheme for the category, a Nepal-recognised conformity grant or an accepted IEC 62133 test report （e.g., under IECEE CB Scheme） is the expected route. Where the category is not scheduled, IEC 62133 compliance is a strong voluntary safety baseline expected by importers and distributors.
summary.zh: 尼泊尔的国家标准（Nepal Standard, NS）主要通过采用国际电工委员会（IEC）标准制定。对于便携式锂电芯及电池组，相关安全参考为IEC 62133-2（便携式密封二次锂电芯及电池安全要求——第2部分：锂系统），在NBSM已将该类别列入计划时作为适用NS采用。该标准涵盖滥用测试（过充、外部短路、挤压、撞击、跌落、热滥用、强制放电）及电化学安全限值。当NBSM对该类别实行强制NS认证或符合性方案时，预期路径为尼泊尔认可的符合性授予或被接受的IEC 62133测试报告（如IECEE CB方案下出具）。当类别未被列入时，符合IEC 62133是进口商和分销商所期望的有力自愿安全基线。
summary.zht: 尼泊爾的國家標準（Nepal Standard, NS）主要通過採用國際電工委員會（IEC）標準制定。對於便攜式鋰電芯及電池組，相關安全參考為IEC 62133-2（便攜式密封二次鋰電芯及電池安全要求——第2部分：鋰系統），在NBSM已將該類別列入計劃時作為適用NS採用。該標準涵蓋濫用測試（過充、外部短路、擠壓、撞擊、跌落、熱濫用、強制放電）及電化學安全限值。當NBSM對該類別實行強制NS認證或符合性方案時，預期路徑為尼泊爾認可的符合性授予或被接受的IEC 62133測試報告（如IECEE CB方案下出具）。當類別未被列入時，符合IEC 62133是進口商和分銷商所期望的有力自願安全基線。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62133-2 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries — Part 2: Lithium systems （adopted as the applicable Nepal Standard where scheduled）
Nepal Standards （Certification Mark） Act, 2037 （1980） — NBSM NS certification basis
IECEE CB Scheme — internationally recognised test reports/certificates often accepted to support NS conformity

summary.en: China's primary safety standard for portable lithium battery packs is GB 31241 （Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment）, with GB 18287 for mobile-phone lithium-ion batteries. GB 31241 is technically derived from IEC 62133 but contains national deviations in test severity and acceptance criteria. A test report from a Chinese CNAS-accredited laboratory to GB 31241 demonstrates compliance with the Chinese national standard; it is not automatically a Nepal NS conformity grant, although an underlying IEC 62133 / IECEE CB report is more readily accepted toward NBSM conformity than a GB-only report.
summary.zh: 中国便携式锂电池组的主要安全标准为GB 31241（便携式电子设备用密封二次锂电芯及电池安全要求），手机锂离子电池另适用GB 18287。GB 31241在技术上源自IEC 62133，但在测试严苛程度和验收准则方面存在国家偏差。中国CNAS认可实验室依据GB 31241出具的检测报告证明符合中国国家标准；其本身不自动构成尼泊尔NS符合性授予，但相比仅GB报告，底层IEC 62133/IECEE CB报告更易被NBSM符合性所接受。
summary.zht: 中國便攜式鋰電池組的主要安全標準為GB 31241（便攜式電子設備用密封二次鋰電芯及電池安全要求），手機鋰離子電池另適用GB 18287。GB 31241在技術上源自IEC 62133，但在測試嚴苛程度和驗收準則方面存在國家偏差。中國CNAS認可實驗室依據GB 31241出具的檢測報告證明符合中國國家標準；其本身不自動構成尼泊爾NS符合性授予，但相比僅GB報告，底層IEC 62133/IECEE CB報告更易被NBSM符合性所接受。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment （SAC/SAMR）
GB 18287 — General specification for lithium-ion batteries for mobile phones （SAC）

gap.en: Because Nepal adopts IEC standards as its NS basis, the cell-safety gap is smaller than for jurisdictions with unique national test methods. The practical gaps are: （1） a GB 31241-only report may not be accepted at face value — an IEC 62133-2 report, preferably under the IECEE CB Scheme, aligns directly with the adopted NS; （2） where NBSM has scheduled the category under a mandatory NS scheme, a formal Nepal conformity grant / certification mark may be required before sale, in addition to the test report; （3） test severity and acceptance differences between GB 31241 and IEC 62133 should be reconciled so the report supports the NS-referenced method. Exporters should confirm with NBSM and the in-country importer whether the specific category is mandatory-scheme or voluntary.
gap.zh: 由于尼泊尔采用IEC标准作为其NS基础，电芯安全差距小于具有独特国家测试方法的法域。实际差距为：（1）仅GB 31241报告可能不被表面接受——IEC 62133-2报告（最好在IECEE CB方案下）与所采用的NS直接对齐；（2）当NBSM已将该类别列入强制NS方案时，除测试报告外，销售前可能须取得正式的尼泊尔符合性授予/认证标志；（3）应协调GB 31241与IEC 62133之间的测试严苛程度和验收差异，使报告支持NS引用的方法。出口商应与NBSM及本地进口商确认该特定类别属强制方案还是自愿。
gap.zht: 由於尼泊爾採用IEC標準作為其NS基礎，電芯安全差距小於具有獨特國家測試方法的法域。實際差距為：（1）僅GB 31241報告可能不被表面接受——IEC 62133-2報告（最好在IECEE CB方案下）與所採用的NS直接對齊；（2）當NBSM已將該類別列入強制NS方案時，除測試報告外，銷售前可能須取得正式的尼泊爾符合性授予/認證標誌；（3）應協調GB 31241與IEC 62133之間的測試嚴苛程度和驗收差異，使報告支持NS引用的方法。出口商應與NBSM及本地進口商確認該特定類別屬強制方案還是自願。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — where NBSM has scheduled the lithium cell/battery category under a mandatory NS scheme, a Nepal conformity grant referencing the adopted IEC 62133 is required; otherwise IEC 62133 is a strong voluntary safety baseline; IECEE CB reports are commonly accepted
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB 31241 compliance required under the SAMR framework for portable lithium batteries sold in China

source.publisher: Nepal Bureau of Standards and Metrology （NBSM）

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Nepal adopts IEC 62133 as the NS basis for portable lithium cell safety, so an IEC 62133-2 test report （ideally under the IECEE CB Scheme） aligns directly with the adopted standard. A GB 31241-only report demonstrates Chinese compliance but may not be accepted at face value for NBSM purposes. Where the category is scheduled under a mandatory NS scheme, a formal Nepal conformity grant may also be required before sale; exporters should confirm scheme status with NBSM and the in-country importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 尼泊尔采用IEC 62133作为便携式锂电芯安全的NS基础，因此IEC 62133-2测试报告（最好在IECEE CB方案下）与所采用标准直接对齐。仅GB 31241报告证明中国符合性，但就NBSM而言可能不被表面接受。当类别被列入强制NS方案时，销售前可能还须取得正式的尼泊尔符合性授予；出口商应与NBSM及本地进口商确认方案状态。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 尼泊爾採用IEC 62133作為便攜式鋰電芯安全的NS基礎，因此IEC 62133-2測試報告（最好在IECEE CB方案下）與所採用標準直接對齊。僅GB 31241報告證明中國符合性，但就NBSM而言可能不被表面接受。當類別被列入強制NS方案時，銷售前可能還須取得正式的尼泊爾符合性授予；出口商應與NBSM及本地進口商確認方案狀態。
